title: Tenant Isolation — Cross-Tenant Leakage Audit & Admin API
description: tenant_isolation.py provides org-scoped SQLite paths, thread-local tenant context, TenantAwareConnection, access validation, and admin helpers. test_tenant_isolation.py validates context set/get/clear and directory scoping. Gap: there is no automated cross-tenant leakage test that verifies queries from org-A cannot return org-B data. The delete_tenant_data admin function exists but is not RBAC-gated.
missing: Cross-tenant leakage test suite: automated test that creates data for two orgs, queries via org-A context, and asserts org-B records never appear
RBAC gate on admin operations: require admin_role check before delete_tenant_data(), list_tenants(), and get_tenant_stats() in tenant_router.py
Tenant audit log: record all tenant context switches in a tamper-evident audit log with timestamp, thread_id, and calling function for forensics
